a_image.alt: Material You (Material 3) style mood board — Google · Material 3

sections.a_eyebrow: Material Design · Dynamic UI · Adaptive UI · Personalized UI · Modern
sections.a_description: Dynamic color palettes, generously rounded surfaces, and the warm expressiveness of Google's next-generation design system — Material You (Material 3) evolves Material Design from systematic consistency to personalized expression. The lavender-tinted surfaces, large border-radius values, and tonal color system create interfaces that feel softer, more human, and uniquely adapted to each user's preferences.

This personalized design system powers Android 12+, Google's latest app redesigns, and the next generation of cross-platform applications. You'll see it on Google Messages, Gmail, Google Photos, and the growing ecosystem of apps adopting M3 components — where dynamic theming means every user's interface reflects their wallpaper colors, making every installation feel uniquely personal.

a_image_cover.alt: Material You (Material 3) style use case illustration
Material You (Material 3) style use case illustration
Material You (Material 3) style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The expressive, personalized aesthetic of Google's Material You (Material 3) — dynamic color theming, larger rounded surfaces, and a warmer, more human evolution of Material Design. Background: soft lavender-tinted surface (#fef7ff). The .inner panel has a surface-container background (#f3edf7) with generous 28px border-radius and no border — the signature M3 rounded container. Colors: primary purple (#6750a4) — M3's default seed color generating tonal palettes. On-surface (#1d1b20) for headings, on-surface-variant (#49454f) for body text. The aesthetic is softer and rounder than Material 2 — more expressive, more personalized, with dynamic color that adapts to user wallpaper and preferences. Set in Google Sans (or Roboto as fallback) — Google's proprietary typeface with friendly geometric proportions. Heading at weight 600, 24px, line-height 1.3, color #1d1b20. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 2px letter-spacing, color #6750a4. Body at weight 400, 14px, line-height 1.6, color #49454f. Buttons: primary — filled (#6750a4), white text, 20px border-radius (M3 pill shape). Secondary: outlined, purple border, 20px border-radius. Alternatives: Roboto Flex (variable Roboto), Product Sans (Google brand).
